root.sql: SELECT memloan.member_group_no, memloan.membership_no, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description, memcoll.member_status_code, (case memcoll.member_status_code when '0' then 'เป็นสมาชิก' when '3' then 'ลาออกแล้ว' end) as status_code_coll, memcoll.resignation_approve_date, memcoll.resign_code, (select sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause where memcoll.resign_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code) as resign_name, --decode( memcoll.member_status_code , '0' , PKB_KTM.fp_get_collpermit_balance( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) , 0 ) as coll_permit, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( memloan.membership_no ) as memname FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered memloan, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_mem_m_membership_registered memcoll WHERE ( memloan.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = memcoll.membership_no ) and ( ( memloan.shareloan_code = '01' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY memloan.member_group_no ASC, memloan.membership_no ASC, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ASC
